_comment_routes: Routes table — controls auth + URL rewrites for Azure Static Web Apps

routes._comment: Export endpoints use API-key auth (called by Power Automate, not a human). Anonymous so we don't 401 before our handler runs.
All other API endpoints require the user to be signed in. Server-side handlers then check role.
Reserved for future admin-only paths if we split the HTML

Never cache the main HTML — it's the single source of truth and changes on every deploy. Without this, browsers serve a stale copy and 'I changed the code but the user sees the old version' bugs happen. Static assets (CSS/JS/images) are unaffected.
Same no-cache for the root path (which navigationFallback rewrites to the HTML).

auth._comment: Entra ID single sign-on — restrict to @iccoftexas.com tenant. App registration must allow only the ICC tenant.
